about.heading: About
about.body: A frontend engineer specializing in React and Next.js. I prioritize user-centered design and maintainable code in everything I build.
about.body2: Passionate about UI/UX, I approach products from both design and engineering perspectives. Component architecture with Tailwind CSS and shadcn-ui is my core strength.

items.title: Portfolio Site
items.description: Personal portfolio built with Next.js 16, shadcn-ui, and next-intl. Features bilingual support and rich animations via motion.

items.title: E-Commerce Dashboard
items.description: Admin dashboard with real-time data visualization and intuitive UI design, built for scale.

items.title: Design System
items.description: Component library for product teams, documented with Storybook and validated with Zod schemas.

contact.heading: Contact
contact.body: Feel free to reach out for work inquiries or any questions.
